site.title: PacketAlchemy
site.description: Engineering Telecom Systems at Scale — Deep dive into 5G Core, PS Core, Huawei networking, and real-world telecom troubleshooting.

hero.subtitle: A telecom engineering knowledge base — from 5G Core and PS Core to packet analysis, Huawei networking, and real-world troubleshooting.

about.title: Telecom Network Engineer
about.bio: I'm Reza, an Electronics Engineer with over 21 years of experience in the telecommunications industry. I currently work on PS Core systems, specializing in Huawei networking equipment and advanced signaling troubleshooting.
about.connectDesc: If you're working in telecom, PS Core, or AI, I'd love to connect and exchange knowledge.

blog.title: Technical
blog.subtitle: Deep dives into telecom protocols, troubleshooting guides, and engineering insights.
blog.newsletterDesc: Get notified when new articles on telecom engineering, packet analysis, and 5G Core are published.

projects.title: Projects &
projects.subtitle: Real-world telecom simulations and engineering tools — from packet analysis to signaling flows.

reference.title: Protocol
reference.subtitle: Quick reference for telecom signaling protocols — ports, message types, and filter cheatsheets.

glossary.title: Telecom
glossary.subtitle: Essential telecom terms explained in plain English

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Interested in telecom engineering, collaboration, or just want to connect? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.githubDesc: Check out my projects, code, and contributions.
